chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 179 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: أيما مؤمن سأل أخاه المؤمن حاجة، وهو يقدر على قضائها، فرده بها، سلط الله عليه شجاعا في قبره ينهش أصابعه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 179. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: If any believer asks a fellow believer for help but the other refuses though he is able to do, Allah will impose a serpent in his grave biting his fingers.
